# Resident and Fellow Phone Numbers

Residents

Aboudan (PGY3) 904-864-4875 Korenblit (PGY4) 954-892-4228

Abraham (PGY3) 724-815-6190 Le (PGY1) 571-289-7062

Alex (PGY2) 317-987-8085 Maria Rodriguez  PGY2 330-734-7880

Campbell (PGY1) 631-827-4839 Panic (PGY4) 781-786-1317

Carter (PGY1) 813-300-2533 Patel (PGY2) 772-828-0039

Crawford (PGY1) 972-849-9063 Pirwani (PGY2) 518-390-1169

Eisenbach (PGY4) 206-718-9957 Remley (PGY2) 904-759-5600

Farrukh (PGY3) 205-253-5119 Santana Firme (PGY3) 313-652-2531

Figueredo Rivas (PGY4) 786-306-0771 Siegel (PGY1) 814-504-5247

Garrison (PGY1) 321-298-7062 Swords (PGY4) 309-648-4739

Glueck (PGY1) 253-330-0359 Tirado Castro (PGY4) 787-509-1042

Gozman (PGY2) 347-432-5660 Van Velsor (PGY3) 309-368-7297

Hedtke (PGY3) 612-968-8754 Varde (PGY1) 904-200-8545

Hernandez (PGY3) 239-691-2251 Walker (PGY3) 305-986-9872

Johnson (PGY4) 954-802-1081 Wasserstrom (PGY4) 954-319-0033

King (PGY2) 601-549-4582 Weston (PGY2) 813-416-4791

Fellows

Bejleri (VAS) 248-703-9066 Marden (SNT) 908-770-8838

Burke (MOV) 215-850-3054 Martinez Nunez (MOV) 313-516-0661

Carpentier (MOV) 514-923-9885 Mustafa (NCC) 513-907-5829

Chan (MOV) 408-858-9923 Nelson (NCC) 949-662-8215

Currie (MOV) 615-335-6959 Remz (MOV) 561-568-9098

Dawson (NCC) 229-263-2060 Rodriguez (MS) 305-992-6561

De La Vara (SNT) 858-342-7389 Sadasivan (CNP) 248-662-6029

Goswami (ICU EEG) 314-740-2991 Snider (MS) 210-885-2522

Haldal (NCC) 501-650-9734 Vasquez (NM) 727-871-1344

Humbert (CNP) 787-398-6545 Wais (NCC) 716-400-6322

Khan (VAS) 704-682-9889 C. Yu (VAS) 845-235-2265

Kincaid (EP) 561-234-0641 J. Yu (MOV) 512-364-3661
